rationale: logLine body after refactor: timestamp + format + appendFile. L0.types-7 asserts both messages survive sequential calls (UNIQUE_TOKEN_xyz + SECOND_LINE_abc both present in final log file) — proves appendFile is concatenative not overwriting. L0.types-11 asserts the static-text invariant (appendFile used, readFile+writeFile gone). Mutations: (a) swap appendFile→writeFile (last-write-wins) kills L0.types-7; (b) swap appendFile→readFile kills L0.types-7 (no write happens); (c) drop the append call entirely kills L0.types-7. All meaningful mutations are killed.
